diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,129 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point, extends HonoBase and sets up default router
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions
+- Simple note: Default router is SmartRouter with [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter]; can be customized via constructor options
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base Hono class with middleware composition, error handling, request routing
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, ErrorHandler, onError, #handleError, #notFoundHandler, compose, clone, app.errorHandler
+- Simple note: Core implementation with middleware stack, error handling via #handleError, composes middleware with compose function
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index file exporting PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Simple re-export from './router'
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter implements pattern-to-regex routing with runtime matching
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router<T>, Route<T>, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, add, match
+- Simple note: Compiles paths to regex on add(), matches against compiled patterns at runtime, converts params with named groups
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index file exporting LinearRouter
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Simple re-export from './router'
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter implements linear path structure matching without precompilation
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router<T>, Router method, add, match, routes, UnsupportedPathError, METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Simple note: Maintains routes array, matches by sequentially finding compatible routes, enforces strict path structure
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Exposes both standard and prepared versions of regex-based router
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter builds optimized regex matchers from routes
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, UnsupportedPathError, trie, buildAllMatchers, routesWithStaticPathFlag, paramAssoc, PATH_ERROR, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT
+- Simple note: Adds routes with pathErrorCheckOnly flag, delegates to trie.insert, builds regex at buildAllMatchers time, throws if matcher already built
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Matcher class for pre-built regex matching, matches at runtime without trie traversal
+- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, match, buildAllMatchers, ParamIndexMap, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Simple note: buildAllMatchers() creates matchers per method, match() looks up by method then uses static map or regex matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter for pre-matching without buildAllMatchers call overhead
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Pre-builds everything at init, throws Error if path not registered when already initialized
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class is trie node representing path segments in pattern router
+- Names noticed: Node, Params, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, pattern, Path, Param
+- Simple note: Has methods/children/patterns/order/params, used as building block for pattern-router and reg-exp-router
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class builds regex from route structure using Node tree
+- Names noticed: Trie, Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, insert, buildRegExp, buildRegExpStr
+- Simple note: Processes param groups, converts path to token sequence, builds regex with replacement maps for index mapping
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index file exporting SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Simple re-export from './router'
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter uses adaptive routing with multiple backend routers
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, #routes, #routers, add, match, activeRouter
+- Simple note: On add(), tries each router in parallel, keeps first one that succeeds, updates match() to delegate, changes name to "SmartRouter + X"
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index file exporting TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Simple re-export from './router'
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter implements trie-based structure routing for fast lookup
+- Names noted: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, add, match
+- Simple note: Routes organized by path hierarchy, node.search traverses tree to find matching path, handles optional parameters
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class implements trie node with child routing tree structure
+Purpose: Trie node class for path tree traversal and parameter handling
+- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, HandlerParamsSet, possibleKeys, score, insert, search
+- Simple note: Methods/children/params stored, constructor handles method+handler or just child nodes, insert() adds route to tree, searches tree for path match
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test utilities for router test suites
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, getSuiteHierarchy, match, beforeEach
+- Simple note: Provides beforeEach hook for setting up router and match function, handles SKIP logic for individual tests
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter functionality
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: Tests duplicate param name throws UnsupportedPathError, tests trailing slash routes with /
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter functionality
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, Multi match, Trailing slash, Skip part
+- Simple note: Tests strict path structure matching, allows trailing slashes, enforces route ordering
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter functionality
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, Matcher, pathErrorCheckOnly
+- Simple note: Tests regex compilation and matching, covers many UnsupportedPathError cases for invalid routes and matcher re-use
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter functionality
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest
+- Simple note: Tests SmartRouter with default [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter] combination
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter functionality
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest
+- Simple note: Direct TrieRouter tests for path matching in trie structure
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for Node class and trie operations
+- Names noticed: Node, methods, children, patterns, order, params, insert, search
+- Simple note: Tests Node constructor, methods of insert, child node traversal, parameter name collision
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, [src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts]
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a benchmark artifact document for a routing-read-write-ledger task. They've provided a specific list of files that I need to read before writing the final document. Let me start by creating the directory if it doesn't exist, then read all the listed files.

2. Read all the listed files
